subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast truly believed in the Ancient Beauty! The King of eternal glory, the sovereign Lord, hath been established upon the throne of grandeur
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بجمال قدم حضرت احدیت و سلطان ربوبیت بر عرش عظمت استقرار یافت و بجمیع
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @names and attributes of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
